hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=j.tool_input?.file_path||j.tool_response?.filePath||'';if(/\.tsx?$/.test(f)){process.stdout.write(f)}else{process.exit(0)}})" | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; echo '{"statusMessage":"Running lint + typecheck..."}'; npx eslint "$f" 2>&1 | head -20; npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.server.json 2>&1 | head -15; npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.client.json 2>&1 | head -15; }
